description: You are a digital content coordinator at a media distribution company. Transcode the master video at /home/ga/Videos/master_content.mp4 to meet the specifications for four platforms defined in /home/ga/Documents/platform_specs.json. Save the deliverables to /home/ga/Videos/deliverables/ using the naming conventions from the specs, and create a manifest at /home/ga/Documents/deliverables_manifest.json listing each output file with its verified technical properties.
